meaning: adj.羽毛丰满的,快会飞的,随时能飞的
examples: Hungary is to have a fully-fledged Stock Exchange from today.
She was now a fully fledged member of the teaching profession.
Some people, such as Mulopo Wally, have even turned urban gardening into a full-fledged business.
They want to use it like a full-fledged desktop, but they're stymied by the input method.
Nokia Drive delivers a full-fledged personal navigation device (PND) with free, turn-by-turn navigation and dedicated in-car-user-interface.
